raw_user_request: Build a pricing page for a subscription service.
concrete_goal: Create a browser-based pricing page for a subscription service with plan comparison, monthly and annual billing states, trial call to action, and checkout handoff messaging.
success_criteria: Visitors can compare Basic, Pro, and Team plans, switch billing cadence, and see the selected plan call to action.
The pricing page includes empty, loading, validation, responsive desktop, and responsive mobile states.
scope_in: Single-page pricing page UI with local client-side state.
scope_out: Payment processing, authentication, external billing integrations, and production deployment.

scenario_flows.name: Compare subscription plans
steps: Switch from monthly to annual billing.
Select the Pro plan and inspect the checkout handoff message.
scenario_flows.expected_result: The page updates plan prices, highlights the selected plan, and shows the checkout handoff message.
failure_or_edge_cases: Unavailable plan selection shows a recoverable validation message.

verification_matrix.behavior_check: Check billing toggle, plan selection, checkout handoff, validation, and responsive behavior.

acceptance_evidence_plan: Desktop and mobile screenshots plus behavior, accessibility, and state coverage.
